\begin{table}[t]
  \centering
  \caption{The charged-fermion masses in the torsiton picture: predicted value, with the measured value in parentheses. The scale is the condensate (the top sets it, $m_t\simeq v/\sqrt2$); each tower's lighter generations---including the electron---are predictions of the soliton overlap ladder, not inputs. Agreement is within a factor of $\sim$3 across five orders of magnitude (leptons $\sim$10--20\%); exact ratios are owed to the lattice (Appendix~\ref{app:lattice}).}
  \label{tab:masses}
  \begin{tabular}{llll}
    \toprule
    family & \multicolumn{3}{c}{generation: torsiton (measured)} \\
     & I & II & III \\
    \cmidrule(lr){2-4}
    up-type quarks & $7.31~\mathrm{MeV}$ ($2.16~\mathrm{MeV}$) & $2.06~\mathrm{GeV}$ ($1.27~\mathrm{GeV}$) & $173~\mathrm{GeV}$ ($173~\mathrm{GeV}$) \\
    down-type quarks & $1.55~\mathrm{MeV}$ ($4.67~\mathrm{MeV}$) & $106~\mathrm{MeV}$ ($93.4~\mathrm{MeV}$) & $4.18~\mathrm{GeV}$ ($4.18~\mathrm{GeV}$) \\
    charged leptons & $482~\mathrm{keV}$ ($511~\mathrm{keV}$) & $121~\mathrm{MeV}$ ($106~\mathrm{MeV}$) & $1.78~\mathrm{GeV}$ ($1.78~\mathrm{GeV}$) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
